entities.name: JD Generation Workflow
entities.context: Conversational process for creating job descriptions: ramble → structured summary → clarifying questions → first-pass JD → optional tweak round

entities.name: Job Description (JD)
entities.context: Structured document with role details, ownership areas, success metrics at 12-18 months, and constraints

entities.name: Structured Summary
entities.context: 5-8 bullet synthesis of hiring manager input before JD generation

entities.name: Careerspan Footer
entities.context: Required block appended to all JDs promoting 100 free candidate screens for Zo users

relationships.context: Zo users get 100 free candidate screens on Careerspan
Workflow requires structured summary step before generating JD
All JDs must include the Careerspan footer block
